steps.name: Navigating to Automation Exercise
Verify the page load with expected URL automationexercise and expected Title Automation Exercise
Click Signup / Login link
Verify the page load with expected URL /login and expected Title Signup
Enter sign-up details
Enter sign-up username - 'Autobot_cleo.rohan'
Enter sign-up email - '1773729314830sammy.ward@yahoo.com'
Click sign up button
Enter account information for signup with Faker Library
Select gender as 'Male'
Enter password ********
Select date of birth as day-month-year '24-November-2000'
Set the checkbox for Opt new letter as : 'true'
Set checkbox - 'Newsletter' as true
Set the checkbox for Opt new letter as : 'false'
Set checkbox - 'Special Offers' as false

parameters.name: checkbox
parameters.value: Locator@internal:text="Receive special offers from our partners!"i

steps.name: Enter firstname - '{}' and lastname - '{}'
Enter address information for signup with Faker Library
Enter company name - 'Oberbrunner, Shields and Altenwerth'
Enter address line 1 - '99076 Russel Fork'
Enter address line 2 - 'Suite 721'
Select country - 'Canada'
Enter state - 'South Dakota'
Enter city - 'Brunoburgh'
Enter zipcode - '{zipcpde}'
Enter mobile number - '0350875504'
Click create account button
Verify the text - 'Account Created' displayed on the page with exactmatch as false
Click continue button
Verify the text - 'Logged in as Autobot_cleo.rohan' displayed on the page with exactmatch as true
Click logout link
Click Signup / Login link
Verify the page load with expected URL /login and expected Title Signup
Enter login details
Enter login email - '1773729314830sammy.ward@yahoo.com'
Enter login password - '*******'
Click login button
Click the menu - 'Products' on the AE Home page
Add multiple products '<<productNames>>' to cart and retrieve product details
Read product full name for the product name - 'Sleeveless'
Read product details for the product name - 'Sleeveless'
Read product price for the product name - 'Sleeveless'
Read product details for the product name - 'Sleeveless'
Click add to cart for the product 'Sleeveless'
Click continue shopping button
Read product full name for the product name - 'Unicorn'
Read product details for the product name - 'Unicorn'
Read product price for the product name - 'Unicorn'
Read product details for the product name - 'Unicorn'
Click add to cart for the product 'Unicorn'
Click continue shopping button
Read product full name for the product name - 'wINter'
Read product details for the product name - 'wINter'
Read product price for the product name - 'wINter'
Read product details for the product name - 'wINter'
Click add to cart for the product 'wINter'
Click continue shopping button
Read product full name for the product name - 'Panda'
Read product details for the product name - 'Panda'
Read product price for the product name - 'Panda'
Read product details for the product name - 'Panda'
Click add to cart for the product 'Panda'
Click view cart link
Click the menu - 'Cart' on the AE Home page
Click Proceed to Checkout Button
Click the menu - 'Cart' on the AE Home page
Click Proceed to Checkout Button
Verify the page load with expected URL /checkout and expected Title Checkout
Read delivery address displayed on checkout page
Read invoice address displayed on checkout page
Read all cart product details
Enter checkout comment
